text: You're such an idiot. How do you even function in daily life? 🤡
context: Reply to someone's opinion post. First interaction between users.

ground_truth.explanation: Personal attack but not severe harassment. Add warning but don't remove.

text: I know where you live. I'm going to show up at your house and make you pay for what you said.

ground_truth.explanation: Direct threat with implied violence. Immediate removal required.

text: Everyone go report @username. They're a terrible person and deserve to be banned.
context: Call to mass report another user without specific reason given.

ground_truth.explanation: Coordinated harassment attempt. Mass reporting call is platform manipulation.

text: I respectfully disagree with your analysis. Here's why I think you're wrong about the economic data...

ground_truth.explanation: Civil disagreement. No harassment, just differing opinion.

text: Die. Just die. Nobody wants you here. Kill yourself.

ground_truth.explanation: Severe harassment with suicide encouragement. Immediate removal.

text: Thread about why @celebrity is problematic (1/20): Let's look at their history of statements...
context: Critical thread about public figure with documented evidence.

ground_truth.explanation: Criticism of public figure with evidence. Not harassment.

text: Hey @username remember when you posted that embarrassing thing 5 years ago? Here's the screenshot 📸
context: Digging up old posts to embarrass someone.

ground_truth.explanation: Doxxing old content to harass. Targeted embarrassment campaign.

text: Your art sucks. Go back to school. This is embarrassing.

ground_truth.explanation: Harsh but not harassment. Criticism of work, not personal attack.

text: 📍 @username's workplace is [company name]. Let's all call their boss and get them fired!
context: Doxxing workplace and calling for real-world consequences.

ground_truth.explanation: Doxxing + coordinated real-world harassment. Severe violation.

text: I'm so disappointed in you. As your fan, I expected better. This really hurts.
context: Fan expressing disappointment to content creator.

text: You're a fraud and everyone should know it. You plagiarized this paper. Here's proof: [link to comparison]
context: Accusation with documented evidence of plagiarism.

ground_truth.explanation: Accusation with evidence. If proven true, this is legitimate whistleblowing.

text: lmao ratio + you fell off + nobody asked + cry about it 😂

ground_truth.explanation: Standard social media culture. Rude but not harassment.

text: Posting @username's home address: [REDACTED]. They deserve what's coming to them.

ground_truth.explanation: Doxxing personal address with threat. Severe safety concern.

text: I used to respect you but after that take I've lost all respect. Unfollowing.

ground_truth.explanation: Expression of opinion change. Not harassment.

text: Every single day I'm going to reply to every tweet you make until you apologize. Day 47.

ground_truth.explanation: Sustained targeted harassment campaign. Pattern of behavior.
